schedule-2:line4.label: Self-employment tax
schedule-2:line4.so: Tani waa canshuurta Social Security iyo Medicare ee dadka shaqada madax-bannaan ah bixiyaan, maxaa yeelay ma laha loo-shaqeeye kara qaybtaas.
schedule-2:line4.en: This is the Social Security and Medicare tax that self-employed people pay, since there's no employer to split it with.

schedule-2:line21.label: Total other taxes
schedule-2:line21.so: Tani waa wadarta guud ee canshuuraha kale ee bogga, oo loo daro Form 1040 sanduuqa 23.
schedule-2:line21.en: This is the total of all the other taxes on this page, added into Form 1040, line 23.
